pageTitle: Tobi's Portfolio - Web3 & Blockchain Systems Engineer

profile.name: Tobiloba Awolaju
profile.title: Web3 Full-Stack & Systems Engineer
profile.bio:
I build high-performance Web3 infrastructure, hybrid on-chain/off-chain systems, and analytics pipelines.

My work focuses on scalable, production-ready systems for blockchain indexing, trading infrastructure, and dApp engineering, enabling teams to ship fast and safely.

sectionLabels.projectsDescription: High-throughput systems for blockchain indexing, execution tracing, Web3 games, and AI-assisted trading.

projects.title: MonadTraceEngine ↗
projects.description: Multi-node blockchain indexing engine with reorg detection, rate-limit resilience, and real-time execution trace streaming for on-chain analytics.

projects.title: DominusQuant ↗
projects.description: AI-assisted crypto trading infrastructure with distributed signal aggregation and optional automated execution for high-frequency strategies.

projects.title: WorldOfNads ↗
projects.description: Browser-based competitive arena game using hybrid Web2/Web3 architecture with instant on-chain settlement and real-time off-chain gameplay.

projects.title: Citadel ↗
projects.description: Persistent hybrid civilization for AI agents, featuring synchronized on/off-chain state, modular agent logic, and scalable backend infrastructure.

projects.title: Superyap ↗
projects.description: Decentralized, anonymous, peer-to-peer encrypted chat app with in-chat transaction support, designed for Web3 social interactions and financial messaging.

projects.title: if-then ↗
projects.description: Personal consequence simulator designed to stop procrastination by modeling decisions and outcomes, showcasing real-time logic computation in TypeScript.

docs.title: Optimizing Gas Costs in Solidity ↗
docs.description: Deep dive into EVM storage layout and gas optimization techniques.

docs.title: ZK-Rollups vs Optimistic Rollups ↗
